title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 526.160 - To operate as release of errors
text:
526.160.  To operate as release of errors. — Every such injunction shall operate as a release of all errors in the proceedings that are prayed to be enjoined.
(RSMo 1939 § 1670) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1506; 1919 § 1956; 1909 § 2521
